summary: Tested More page UI refactoring with nested card-style dropdowns. All 10 features verified working correctly: login, all sections collapsed by default, expand/collapse functionality, count badges, child items with right chevrons, profile card display, logout button, and Administration section visibility for admin users.
critical_code_review_comments: More page uses nested card-style layout matching Users page reference design
Section headers are standalone dark cards (#1C1C1E) with icon, title, count badge, and chevron
Child items render as indented cards (#2C2C2E) with marginLeft:16 when sections expanded
Each child item has: icon (colored background), title, subtitle, right chevron-forward
All 8 sections start COLLAPSED by default (verified no child items visible on page load)
Administration section (15 items) visible for super_admin role only
Count badges show correct item counts: Administration (15), Essentials (3), Communication (5), Templates & Branding (4), Performance (3), Contacts & Leads (4), Profile & AI (2), Settings (5)
Expand/collapse toggle works correctly - clicking header expands/collapses section
Profile card displays user info: name (Forest Ward), email, phone, Super Admin badge
Logout button (red exit icon) works - redirects to login page
Child item navigation works - clicking Users navigates to /admin/users
context_for_next_testing_agent: More page UI refactoring is complete. All sections use nested card-style dropdowns: 1) Section headers are dark standalone cards with icon, title, count badge, chevron, 2) Child items are indented cards with darker background when expanded, 3) All sections start COLLAPSED by default, 4) Administration section only visible for admin users, 5) Profile card at top shows user info, 6) Logout button (red icon) next to profile works correctly.

features_verified.more_page_loads_after_login: PASS - Page loads correctly after forest@imosapp.com login
features_verified.all_sections_visible_as_collapsed_cards: PASS - 8 sections visible: Administration, Essentials, Communication, Templates & Branding, Performance, Contacts & Leads, Profile & AI, Settings
features_verified.all_sections_start_collapsed: PASS - All sections have chevron-down icons, no child items visible on page load
features_verified.section_header_expand_works: PASS - Clicking Administration header shows 15 child items (Admin Dashboard, Invite Team, Organizations, etc.)
features_verified.section_header_collapse_works: PASS - Clicking expanded section header collapses it back
features_verified.count_badges_correct: PASS - Badges show: 15, 3, 5, 4, 3, 4, 2, 5 for respective sections
features_verified.child_items_with_right_chevron: PASS - All child items have chevron-forward icon on right side
features_verified.profile_card_displays_user_info: PASS - Shows Forest Ward, forest@imosapp.com, phone, Super Admin badge
features_verified.administration_section_for_admin: PASS - Administration section visible for super_admin role

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features verified working correctly
